untranslatable_reason: Signal requires decomposition of implied volatility term structure (σ₁, σ₂, σₑ, σf) which are not available in the allowed indicators list. The signal demands: (1) front-month IV vs second-month IV comparison, (2) event volatility isolation and quantification, (3) forward volatility calculation using specific formula σf = √[T₂²σ₂² - T₁²σ₁²]/(T₂-T₁), and (4) relative magnitude thresholds between event vol and front-month IV. None of these volatility structure decomposition metrics exist in the allowed indicator set (which contains only india_vix, hvol_20, and atr-based volatility proxies). This is a fundamental mismatch between an options market microstructure signal and equity price-action indicators.
translation_notes: SINCLAIR_DRY_3_0 is a volatility term structure arbitrage signal requiring real-time options implied volatility data across multiple expirations. The backtest engine would need to add: iv_front_month, iv_second_month, event_volatility, forward_volatility indicators to make this translatable. Current allowed indicators cannot decompose or measure IV term structure inversion or event-driven volatility isolation.
